title: aristida longespica var. geniculata
intro: Aristida longespica var. geniculata, also known as the Slender Three-awn Grass, is a perennial grass plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aristida longespica var. geniculata include the treatment of wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations may also involve the use of its leaves and roots to create teas, tinctures, and topical applications.
